Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.subtitle: We are always happy to answer your inquiries. These are the official and only channels for Kero Trade.
Contact.warning_desc: Beware of anyone impersonating Kero or using the name 'Kero Trade' for communication. Official and exclusive communication is only through the links and accounts mentioned above.

About.title: Who is Kero?
About.subtitle:
Kero Trade is a professional trader and mentor in the financial markets with over 6 years of experience in market analysis and price action understanding.

During this journey, he has trained nearly 500 students from various Arab countries, helping them develop their trading skills and build a clear vision of market direction.

Kero Trade's approach relies on practical experience and direct application within the market, not just theories. Focus is placed on understanding the general trend using Advanced Wave Analysis and determining precise entry and exit points through Advanced Classical Analysis.
About.vision_desc: At Kero Trade, we aim to build a generation of traders capable of understanding the market consciously and professionally, away from randomness and blind recommendations, by teaching a clear methodology that helps the trader make their own decisions with confidence.
About.experience_desc: The Kero Trade team has over 6 years of experience in the financial markets, training more than 500 traders from various Arab countries, with direct practical application on market movement rather than just theoretical explanation.
About.methodology_desc: We rely on merging Advanced Wave Analysis with Advanced Classical Analysis to determine the general market trend and extract the most accurate entry and exit points, in a simplified and organized educational style that helps the trader reach professionalism quickly.
About.student_desc: Students trained from various Arab countries who developed their skills with us.
About.success_desc: Traders moved from loss to consistent profitability thanks to developed methodologies.
About.mastery_desc: Full mastery of financial markets and price action analysis

Legal.privacy_content: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. Your data is used only to improve your learning experience within the platform.
Legal.terms_content: By using the platform, you agree to our terms and conditions. Sharing your account or republishing educational content is strictly prohibited.
Legal.disclaimer_content: Educational materials are not to be considered investment advice. Trading contains risks of capital loss.
Legal.disclaimer_past_results: Past results do not guarantee future performance. You are solely responsible for your investment decisions.
Legal.terms_p1_content: Content is for personal use only. Sharing passwords with others is strictly prohibited.
Legal.terms_p2_content: All videos and educational materials are owned by Kero Trade Academy and protected by intellectual property laws.
Legal.privacy_p1_content: We collect name, email, and phone number upon registration to ensure account security and provide necessary support.
Legal.privacy_p2_content: We use advanced encryption technologies to protect your data from unauthorized access.
